name: tinyfish-search
description: Run web searches via the TinyFish Search API and get structured JSON results (title, snippet, site name, URL) with optional geo and language targeting.

interface.shortDescription: Run web searches via the TinyFish Search API and get structured JSON results (title, snippet, site name, URL) with optional geo and language targeting.
interface.longDescription: Call the TinyFish Search API (or scripts/search.sh) to fetch ranked, structured web results ready for LLM consumption.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use TinyFish Search safely.
